title: Part 5: Nvidia’s CPO Supply Chain
title_translation: 第五部分：英伟达CPO供应链

paragraphs.source: We have discussed the role key components play in CPO systems, in this section we will discuss specific companies in the supply chain and component BOM cost with a focus on Nvidia’s suppliers, naming key suppliers for Laser Sources, ELS Modules, FAU, FAU Alight Tools, FAU Assembly, Shuffle Box, MPO Connectors, MT Ferrules, Fibers, and E/O Testing.

inline_elements.text: Laser Sources, ELS Modules, FAU, FAU Alight Tools, FAU Assembly, Shuffle Box, MPO Connectors, MT Ferrules, Fibers, and E/O Testing

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: We have discussed the role key components play in CPO systems, in this section we will discuss specific companies in the supply chain and component BOM cost with a focus on Nvidia’s suppliers, naming key suppliers for **Laser Sources, ELS Modules, FAU, FAU Alight Tools, FAU Assembly, Shuffle Box, MPO Connectors, MT Ferrules, Fibers, and E/O Testing**.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: We have discussed the role key components play in CPO systems, in this section we will discuss specific companies in the supply chain and component BOM cost with a focus on Nvidia’s suppliers, naming key suppliers for Laser Sources, ELS Modules, FAU, FAU Alight Tools, FAU Assembly, Shuffle Box, MPO Connectors, MT Ferrules, Fibers, and E/O Testing.

parent_inline_elements.text: Laser Sources, ELS Modules, FAU, FAU Alight Tools, FAU Assembly, Shuffle Box, MPO Connectors, MT Ferrules, Fibers, and E/O Testing

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**
我们此前已讨论了各关键组件在共封装光学（CPO）系统中的作用，本节将聚焦英伟达的供应链，介绍相关企业及其组件物料清单（BOM）成本，重点列出激光源、外部激光源模块（External Laser Source, ELS）、光纤阵列（Fiber Array Unit, FAU）、FAU对准工具、FAU组装、光纤重排盒（Shuffle Box）、MPO连接器、MT插芯、光纤以及电光测试（E/O Testing）等环节的主要供应商。
pro.tokenized_text:
**修订后的译文：**
我们此前已讨论了各关键组件在共封装光学（CPO）系统中的作用，本节将聚焦英伟达的供应链，介绍相关企业及其组件物料清单（BOM）成本，重点列出[[[STRONG_1|激光源、外部激光源模块（External Laser Source, ELS）、光纤阵列（Fiber Array Unit, FAU）、FAU对准工具、FAU组装、光纤重排盒（Shuffle Box）、MPO连接器、MT插芯、光纤以及电光测试（E/O Testing）]]]等环节的主要供应商。

issues.description: BOM术语翻译不规范，未使用规定译法
部分关键缩写首次出现未按要求附注英文全称和中文解释
句子过长且存在翻译腔，列表结构被机械串联
语气略显生硬，未能体现原文分析性、冷静且具有洞察力的专业声线
术语表述不够准确和地道
